Falling Fruit record for Himalayan blackberry.
Lucky Memorial Dog Park, 10100 NE 149th St, Brush Prairie, WA 98606, USA
Blackberry bushes on the west fence up to the north fence of the park. Access: Public.

[SR 503 N between Brush Prairie and Battle Ground Washington] The walking path beside WA SR 503 North was planted with a blueberry/huckle berry type. Ripe and available June-ish through September. Please pull ALL the way off the Highway before picking, or you
